scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 172.16.26.2 s=- c=IN IP4 172.16.26.2 t=0 0 m=audio 5010 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 9 110 101 120 a=sendrecv m=video 5012 RTP/AVP 100 98 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:100 H264/90000

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 172.16.26.2 s=- c=IN IP4 172.16.26.2 t=0 0 m=audio 5010 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 9 110 101 120 a=ptime:20 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:109 telephone-event/8000 m=video 5012 RTP/AVP 100 98 a=inactive a=rtpmap:100 H264/90000
